description: Modernize the expenses filter UI by removing neo-brutalist styling and replacing with a clean, compact modern design. Also modernize the date range picker with preset ranges and better visual treatment. Also remove the neo-brutalist styling from the expenses page parent Card.
steps: Rewrite src/components/expenses/expenses-filters.tsx: Remove the neoControlClass, neoButtonClass, neoPopoverClass variables entirely. Replace the outer container div's neo-brutalist classes (border-2 border-primary/35, shadow-[4px_4px...]) with a clean modern style: use 'rounded-lg border bg-card p-3 sm:p-4 space-y-3' (single thin border, no box-shadow). Make the layout more compact: put all primary filters (search, category, status, bill statement) on one row using a responsive grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4). Move date range and sort to a second compact row. Remove the heavy font-bold/font-black from controls. Filter controls should use standard shadcn/ui styling (no extra border-2 or shadows beyond what the base components provide). Keep the 'Apply Filters' and 'Clear' button workflow but make buttons use standard shadcn button variants (default for Apply, ghost for Clear) without neo-brutalist shadows.

In the same file, modernize the date range picker popover: Add preset date range buttons inside the popover (Today, Last 7 days, Last 30 days, This month, Last month). Display these as a vertical list of small buttons on the left side of the popover, with the Calendar on the right. Use a flex layout inside PopoverContent. Presets should set the dateRange state directly when clicked. Keep the 2-month calendar but make the popover content wider (w-auto) to accommodate the presets sidebar.

In src/app/(dashboard)/expenses/page.tsx, remove the neo-brutalist styling from the parent Card component. Change the Card className from 'rounded-lg border-2 border-primary/35 shadow-[5px_5px_0px_0px_rgba(79,70,229,0.16)] dark:border-primary/45 dark:shadow-[5px_5px_0px_0px_rgba(129,140,248,0.22)]' to just 'rounded-lg' (let the default Card border handle it).

Ensure all filter labels use Sentence case: 'All categories', 'All status', 'All bill statements', 'Pick a date range', 'Sort by', 'Ascending', 'Descending'. Check the select placeholder text and option labels.
acceptance_criteria: No neo-brutalist class variables (neoControlClass, neoButtonClass, neoPopoverClass) remain in expenses-filters.tsx
No shadow-[...px...] patterns remain in expenses-filters.tsx or on the expenses page Card
No border-2 with primary/35 or primary/45 coloring remains on filters or expenses Card
The date range popover includes a presets sidebar with at least 5 preset options (Today, Last 7 days, Last 30 days, This month, Last month)
Filter layout is a compact single-row grid on desktop for the primary filters
All placeholder/label text uses Sentence case
verification: Run pnpm build to confirm the project compiles successfully
Run pnpm lint to confirm no linting errors
